things.name: Mount Kinabalu Climb
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Borneo's highest peak at 4,095m with a guided overnight summit climb

things.name: Sipadan Island Diving
things.description: One of the world's top dive sites with sea turtles, sharks and barracuda tornados

things.name: Orang-utan Sanctuary (Sepilok)
things.description: Rehabilitation centre where orphaned orang-utans learn to return to the wild

things.name: Sunset at the Filipino Market
things.description: Evening market with fresh barbecued seafood on the Kota Kinabalu waterfront

things.name: Tunku Abdul Rahman Marine Park
things.description: Five island marine park with snorkelling 10 minutes by boat from the city

things.name: Rafflesia Viewing (Poring Hot Springs)
things.description: See the world's largest flower - the Rafflesia arnoldii blooms 100cm across

things.name: Kinabalu Park & Canopy Walkway
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage lowland rainforest with pitcher plants and hornbills

things.name: Monsopiad Cultural Village
things.description: Kadazan-Dusun village with headhunting history and traditional dancing

things.name: Gaya Island Snorkelling
things.description: Coral reef snorkelling and the Garama River firefly cruise

things.name: Hinava (Raw Fish Salad)
things.description: KK's signature Kadazan-Dusun dish - raw fish marinated in bitter gourd and lime
